message.content: This section contains only the heading "动作" (Action/Movement) and lacks any substantive body text, data, or references. Consequently, it does not provide information to answer retrieval questions regarding specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It functions solely as a structural title or placeholder.
